About

Building things.
Giving back.

I'm Tariq — a Senior Software Engineer at Apple with a deep love for the community. I create Arabic tech content that makes complex engineering accessible to developers across the Arab world.

Through coaching, courses, and honest conversations about the tech industry, I work with engineers to help them land jobs at top companies and navigate their careers with confidence.

My Podcast

Where Arab engineers
tell their story.

تقني بحت is a podcast where I sit down with Arab experts, builders, and engineers — diving deep into their journeys, lessons learned, and the unfiltered reality of working in tech.

No fluff. Just real conversations about careers, code, and what it actually takes to grow in this industry — in Arabic, for the Arab world.

30+ Episodes

Hackathon

Where builders
come together.

Salam Hack is a hackathon I organize for Arab developers and builders — a space to create, compete, and connect with the tech community.

Visit salamhack.com →
